reviews.comment:
Siempre tiene un movimiento grande de clientes. Y yo siempre paso de viaje y me tomo  un café negro bien cargado para poder seguir de viaje. La atención del shop es exelente , como la de la gente de la playa. Los baños impecables .

(Translated by Google)
It's always busy with customers. And I often stop by on my travels and grab a strong black coffee to fuel me up for the rest of my journey. The service at the shop is excellent, just like the people on the beach. The restrooms are spotless.
